original_image_tags: A greenish-blue paper document, a "First Indorsement" form. The text is typed. In the lower-left, there is a typed "1 Incl. n/c" followed by a handwritten note "

elements.description: Typed memorandum on blue paper with stamps and handwritten annotations, no photographs, sketches, or diagrams.

judge.reason: Description A claims specific visual elements (a greenish-blue paper document, a handwritten note) that Description B explicitly states are absent ('no photographs, sketches, or diagrams'), creating a direct contradiction on the presence of visual content.
